errors.AMBIGUOUS_USERNAME: Username exists in multiple restaurants. Please specify the restaurant.
errors.LAST_ADMIN: The restaurant must retain at least one administrator
errors.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
errors.SESSION_HAS_ITEMS: The session has orders. Close it or cancel the orders before cancelling the session
errors.ACTIVE_SESSION_EXISTS: There is already an active session. Close it before opening another one
errors.SESSION_ALREADY_PAID: Session is already paid and cannot be reopened
errors.ORDER_LIMIT_REACHED: The maximum number of orders for this session has been reached
errors.ORDER_INTERVAL_ACTIVE: The minimum time between orders has not passed yet
errors.ITEM_NOT_FOUND_OR_ALREADY_PROCESSED: Item not found or already processed
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_ITEM_NOT_ORDERED: Cannot delete item that is not ordered
errors.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: User already exists in this restaurant
errors.CUSTOMER_NAME_TAKEN: That name is already taken at this table. Choose another
errors.CUSTOMER_NAME_REQUIRED: A name of at least 2 characters is required
errors.AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many login attempts. Please try again later
errors.API_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please slow down
errors.STRICT_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many operations. Please wait before trying again
errors.UPLOAD_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Upload limit reached. Please try again later
errors.QR_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many QR scans. Please try again later
errors.QR_BRUTE_FORCE_DETECTED: Too many attempts. QR code may be invalid
errors.IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT: This request key was already used with different order details

sockets.SESSION_CLOSED_NO_MORE_ORDERS: The bill has been requested. No more orders can be placed.
sockets.WAITER_COMING: A waiter is coming right away
sockets.BILL_ALREADY_REQUESTED: The bill has already been requested.
sockets.BILL_REQUEST_SENT: Your bill request has been sent. The session will close shortly.
sockets.WAITER_COMING_ASSIST: A waiter is coming to assist you
sockets.SESSION_ENDED_THANK_YOU: The session has ended. Thank you for your visit.
sockets.SESSION_CLOSING_IN_PROGRESS: The session is closing. No more orders can be placed.
